svg.title: MPM 2.0 Kafka architecture — Purdue ISA-95
svg.desc: Kafka-based MPM 2.0 architecture for Volvo Cars Torslanda. Dual simulator publishes identical Castle MES events to both RabbitMQ and Kafka simultaneously. Kafka bridge exposes 160 tags over HTTP on port 9098. Ignition Gateway polls bridge and drives three Perspective dashboards under project MPM2_Kafka. Grafana scrapes both bridge metrics endpoints for side-by-side comparison.
svg.text: Volvo Cars Torslanda (VCT) · Python 3.11 | Apache Kafka 3.x | Ignition 8.3.4 | Flask 3.1

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does castle_simulator_dual.py publish to both RabbitMQ and Kafka simultaneously?')
sendPrompt('What pages does the Castle MES Portal have and how does it trigger events?')

svg.text: Integration layer — L3 → L2 · Apache Kafka

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What are the 8 Kafka topic names and how do they map to the RabbitMQ queues?')
sendPrompt('How does kafka_bridge.py consume Kafka topics and serve the 160-tag JSON endpoint?')

svg.text: Level 2 — supervisory control (SCADA / HMI) · project: MPM2_Kafka

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What is the only change in Ignition Gateway config to switch from RabbitMQ to Kafka stack?')
sendPrompt('PlantOverview dashboard tag bindings for MPM2_Kafka project')
sendPrompt('MPM Classic dashboard in the Kafka project — what changes vs MQ stack?')
sendPrompt('MPM Modern dashboard in the Kafka project')

g.text: Real Castle MES connects here in production · out of scope for this POC

svg.text: Grafana comparison — dual-stack simultaneous metrics (:9101 vs :9102)

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What Prometheus metrics does the MQ bridge expose on port 9101?')
sendPrompt('How does Grafana compare MQ vs Kafka side-by-side using Prometheus scraping?')
sendPrompt('What Prometheus metrics does the Kafka bridge expose on port 9102?')

svg.text: Scrapes both bridges simultaneously — compares MQ vs Kafka: latency · throughput · queue lag · bridge time
